zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Thorpe於大約1343年出生在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普時，他的父親Edmund Thorpe25歲，母親Joan Baynard22歲。他於1368年10月3日與Margaret Delariver結婚。他於1417年登記服兵役。他於1379年在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普被列為sheriff of norfolk and suffolk。他去世於1419年7月1日在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年77歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Thorpe于大约1343年出生在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普时，他的父亲Edmund Thorpe25岁，母亲Joan Baynard22岁。他于1368年10月3日与Margaret Delariver结婚。他于1417年登记服兵役。他于1379年在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普被列为sheriff of norfolk and suffolk。他去世于1419年7月1日在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年77岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Thorpe was born about 1343, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Edmund Thorpe, was 25 and his mother, Joan Baynard, was 22. He married Margaret Delariver on 3 October 1368. He registered for military service in 1417. In 1379, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as sheriff of norfolk and suffolk in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England. He died on 1 July 1419, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Thorpe est né environ 1343, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Thorpe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Baynard, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Delariver le 3 octobre 1368. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1417. En 1379, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of norfolk and suffolk à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1419, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Thorpe um 1343 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Thorpe 25 und seine Mutter Joan Baynard 22. Er hat am 3. Oktober 1368 Margaret Delariver geheiratet. Er hat sich 1417 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1379, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of norfolk and suffolk in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Juli 1419 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Thorpe è nato il circa 1343 nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Edmund Thorpe, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan Baynard, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Delariver il 3 ottobre 1368. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1417. Nel 1379, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of norfolk and suffolk nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England. Morì il 1 luglio 1419, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Thorpeが約1343年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで生まれた時，父Edmund Thorpeは25歳，母Joan Baynardは22歳であった。1368年10月3日にMargaret Delariverと結婚した。彼は1417年に兵役登録をした。1379年，39歳の時，イギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペでの職業はsheriff of norfolk and suffolkと記録されている。彼は1419年7月1日にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで77歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Thorpe(이)가 대략 1343년 영국 노르폴크 애스h웰소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Thorpe(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Baynard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1368년 10월 3일 Margaret Delariver(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1417년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1379년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크 애스h웰소에서 sheriff of norfolk and suffolk이었다. 그는 1419년 7월 1일 영국 노르폴크 애스h웰소에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 애스h웰소에 묻혔다.

mn.Hessett, Suffolk, England: Hessett, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Thorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1343, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Thorpe, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Baynard, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Delariver em 3 de outubro de 1368. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1417. Em 1379, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of norfolk and suffolk em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1419, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Thorpe родился около 1343 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Thorpe было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Baynard, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Delariver 3 октября 1368 г. В 1417 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1379 году, в возрасте 39 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of norfolk and suffolk в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия. Он умер 1 июля 1419 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Thorpe nació aproximadamente 1343, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Thorpe, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Baynard, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Delariver el 3 de octubre de 1368. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1417. En 1379, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of norfolk and suffolk en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de julio de 1419, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
